briefing.market_summary: KOSPI saw a rebound on March 24th, rising 2.19%-2.7% to close at 5,553.92, following a significant 6% drop the previous day driven by Middle East geopolitical tensions. Retail investors set record net purchases, countering strong institutional and foreign sell-offs.
